Errata candidate: 'are' -> 'MUST be'.

statements.statement: serialisation and parsing MUST NOT fetch remote documents — no JSON-LD remote @context resolution beyond a server-configured allowlist of cached contexts, no owl:imports, no follow-your-nose.
statements.comment: The no-dereference rule (SSRF guard); the JSON-LD-specific application is JLWSR-RT-5/6. Testable at the transform seam with a network observer on attacker-supplied content.
